title: epipactis × graberi
intro: Epipactis × graberi, also known as the Graber's helleborine, is a hybrid orchid plant that is a cross between Epipactis palustris and Epipactis microphylla. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Epipactis × graberi include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially exhibiting antioxidant and anticancer properties. Epipactis × graberi can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in modern herbalism for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
